name: Parametric Rolling Monitor
description: Real-time parametric rolling risk assessment for cruise ships - GM editable, course correction, sea direction aware

icons.src: data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 192 192'><rect fill='%230f172a' width='192' height='192'/><circle cx='96' cy='96' r='85' fill='%231e3a8a' stroke='%2306b6d4' stroke-width='4'/><path d='M60,96 Q96,130 132,96' stroke='%2306b6d4' stroke-width='3' fill='none' stroke-linecap='round'/><path d='M70,80 Q96,110 122,80' stroke='%2306d9ff' stroke-width='2' fill='none' stroke-linecap='round'/><text x='96' y='150' font-size='24' font-weight='bold' fill='%2306b6d4' text-anchor='middle' font-family='Arial'>PARA</text></svg>

data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 512 512'><rect fill='%230f172a' width='512' height='512'/><circle cx='256' cy='256' r='220' fill='%231e3a8a' stroke='%2306b6d4' stroke-width='10'/><path d='M180,256 Q256,360 332,256' stroke='%2306b6d4' stroke-width='8' fill='none' stroke-linecap='round'/><path d='M210,220 Q256,310 302,220' stroke='%2306d9ff' stroke-width='5' fill='none' stroke-linecap='round'/><text x='256' y='420' font-size='60' font-weight='bold' fill='%2306b6d4' text-anchor='middle' font-family='Arial'>PARAMETRIC</text></svg>

screenshots.src: data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 540 720'><rect fill='%230f172a' width='540' height='720'/><rect fill='%231e3a8a' width='540' height='100' stroke='%2306b6d4' stroke-width='2'/><text x='270' y='60' font-size='18' font-weight='bold' fill='%2306b6d4' text-anchor='middle' font-family='Arial'>Parametric Rolling Monitor</text><rect fill='%230f172a' x='20' y='130' width='500' height='100' rx='10' stroke='%2306b6d4' stroke-width='2'/><text x='270' y='175' font-size='14' fill='%2306b6d4' text-anchor='middle' font-family='Arial'>Risk Assessment: PARAMETRIC</text><text x='270' y='200' font-size='28' font-weight='bold' fill='%2306b6d4' text-anchor='middle' font-family='Arial'>2.1×</text><rect fill='%230f172a' x='20' y='250' width='500' height='150' rx='10' stroke='%2306b6d4' stroke-width='2'/><text x='30' y='280' font-size='12' fill='%23cbd5e1' font-family='Arial'>Wave Period: 9.5s</text><text x='30' y='310' font-size='12' fill='%23cbd5e1' font-family='Arial'>Ship Heading: 0°</text><text x='30' y='340' font-size='12' fill='%23cbd5e1' font-family='Arial'>Wave Direction: 180°</text><text x='30' y='370' font-size='12' fill='%23cbd5e1' font-family='Arial'>GM Fluid: 1.63m | Reserve: 0.22m</text></svg>
